user.title: Vaillant Genia Air
user.description: This integration relies on the ebusd add-on by LukasGrebe ({ebusd_repo}) publishing eBUS messages to MQTT. Make sure the add-on is installed and running before continuing.

data.topic_prefix: MQTT topic prefix (set in the ebusd add-on, default 'ebusd')

migration.title: Migrate {count} existing entities?
migration.description: We detected {count} entities from a previous installation of the raw ebusd MQTT discovery (or genia-air-pack). We can adopt them so your existing history, dashboards and automations keep working.

confirm.title: Confirm installation

error.mqtt_unavailable: MQTT integration is not available. Install Mosquitto or another broker first.
error.no_ebusd_traffic: No ebusd traffic detected in 30 s. Check the ebusd add-on is running and the topic prefix is correct.

abort.already_configured: This Genia Air installation is already configured.

rollback_migration.name: Rollback migration
rollback_migration.description: Restore the legacy unique_ids from before the integration adopted them. Useful if something went wrong and you want to revert to the raw ebusd MQTT discovery.
